title: Crunchy Minty Peppercorn Stir-fry
description: A crunchy and minty peppercorn stir-fry that is both savory and refreshing, this dish is perfect for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: Heat a wok or skillet over medium-high heat. Add the mint leaves and sesame seeds to the pan and cook for about 30 seconds.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger, stir-fry for another minute until fragrant.
Add green peppercorns, chicken broth/water, and soy sauce. Bring to a boil then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 5 minutes or until the liquid has reduced slightly.
Stir in chopped mint leaves last and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
